AbnormalHeartbeatStatusCount.description: Number of machines with abnormal heartbeat status

AgentLatestVersion.description: Latest LogCollector version number available for upgrade

AutoUpdate.description: Enable LogCollector auto upgrade on machine group servers. true: The log service will check upgrade conditions during the specified time period each day. If conditions are met, LogCollector will be upgraded automatically without manual intervention. false (default): LogCollector will not upgrade automatically. To use a newer version, refer to the LogCollector upgrade procedure.

HostCount.description: Number of machines in the machine group

HostGroupType.description: Machine group type. IP: machine IP. Label: machine label.

IamProjectName.description: IAM project associated with the machine group

NormalHeartbeatStatusCount.description: Number of machines with normal heartbeat status

RuleCount.description: Number of collection configurations bound to the machine group

ServiceLogging.description: Enable LogCollector service log feature. true: enabled. false (default): disabled.

UpdateStartTime.description: LogCollector auto upgrade start time. Note: Only required when AutoUpdate is set to true. It is recommended to schedule auto upgrade during off-peak hours. LogCollector may restart during the upgrade process, but logs will not be lost.

description: Resource representing the binding relationship between collection configuration and machine group
